action_text: Choose "Delete" from the "Actions on selected rows" dropdown
rationale: The duplicate non-task expense line (row EXP-35319670314) is already selected; using the list’s bulk action is the quickest way to remove it.
Before deleting, quickly verify the selected row isn’t tied to a task by opening its preview in-place.
Confirm the other record with the same short description is task-related so we don’t delete it by mistake.

action_text: Toggle "Show column search row" to display per-column filters
rationale: If further refinement is needed to identify duplicates across columns, enable the per-column search row.

action_text: Open the "Short description" column options menu
rationale: Use column controls to sort or configure the Short description column, which can help surface any other duplicates.
